externaldata-desc: Waxay oggolaanaysaa in laga soo saaro xog qaabaysan ilo dibadda ah sida URL-yada, xog ururin iyo ilo kale
externaldata-param-type-error: Cilad: Cabbirka $1 waa inuu noqdaa nooca $2.
externaldata-processing-exception: Waxaa dhacay khalad marka la fulinayay hor-processor ama postprocessor: $1
externaldata-php-library-missing: Cilad: Maktabadda PHP ee $1, oo loo baahan yahay si loo isticmaalo $2, waa maqan tahay.
external-data-no-suitable-connector: Cilad: Ma jiro ilo xog oo ku habboon oo loo qeexay su'aashan xog dibadda ah
externaldata-ldap-unable-to-bind: Lama isku xiri karo domain-ka LDAP $1 iyadoo la adeegsanayo magaca isticmaalaha iyo erayga sirta ah ee loo dejiyey domain-kan.
externaldata-ldap-base-dn-not-defined: Base DN lama dejin domain-ka LDAP $1.
externaldata-db-incomplete-information: Cilad: Xogta lama dhammaystirin ee aqoonsiga xog-ururinta $1 ($2).
externaldata-db-could-not-get-url: Lama la xiriirin URL-ka $1 kadib $2 {{PLURAL:$2|isku day|isku dayo}}.
externaldata-db-unknown-type: Cilad: Nooca xog ururinta $1 lama yaqaan.
externaldata-db-could-not-connect: Cilad: Lama xiriiri karo xog ururinta ($1).
externaldata-db-unknown-database: Cilad: Lama dooran karo xog-ururinta lagu qeexay aqoonsiga $1.
externaldata-db-no-return-values: Cilad: Lama qeexin wax natiijooyin soo noqosho ah.
externaldata-db-too-many-joins: Tirada shuruudaha JOIN (hadda $1) waa inaysan ka badnaan tirada miisaska ($2)
externaldata-db-invalid-join: Shuruud JOIN ah oo khaldan $1: qayb kasta waa inay lahaataa calaamadda "=".
externaldata-db-empty-rowset: Weydiinta $1 waxay soo celisay natiijo madhan.
externaldata-db-prepared-not-specified: Fadlan sheeg (query=), bayaanka diyaarsan ee la adeegsanayo ee xog-ururinta aqoonsiga $1.
externaldata-db-prepared-config-wrong-da: Weydiinta diyaarsan ($2) ee loo qeexay aqoonsiga xog-ururinta "$1" way jirtaa, laakiin si sax ah looma diyaarin.
externaldata-db-prepared-wrong-params: Weydiinta diyaarsan ($2) ee loo qeexay aqoonsiga xog-ururinta "$1" waxay dhalisay khalad ($3)
externaldata-db-no-such-prepared: Bayaanka diyaarsan $2 looma diyaarin xog-ururinta aqoonsiga $1.
externaldata-db-odbc-illegal: Cabbirka $2 wuxuu ka kooban yahay isku-dhaf aan la oggolayn $1. Fadlan jooji.
externaldata-mongodb-aggregation-failed: Isku ururinta MongoDB way fashilantay khaladka $1
externaldata-format-unavailable: Maktabadda $1, oo loo baahan yahay si loo isticmaalo qaabka '$2' iyada oo aan la adeegsan ikhtiyaarka '$3', waa maqan tahay.
externaldata-format-unavailable-absolute: Maktabadda $1, oo loo baahan yahay si loo isticmaalo qaabka '$2', waa maqan tahay.
externaldata-post-failed: Codsi POST ah oo loo diray $1 wuu fashilmay: $2.
externaldata-url-hooks-aborted: Hook-ga '$1' waa la joojiyay, waxaana soo celiyay khaladaad: $2
externaldata-url-not-fetched: Cilad markii xog laga soo qaadayay URL $1: $2.
externaldata-url-unknown-error: Cilad aan la aqoon ayaa dhacday marka xog laga soo qaadayay URL $1.
externaldata-caught-exception-soap: Waxaa la qabtay khalad $1 markii la samaynayay SOAP client.
externaldata-caught-exception-parsing-ht: Waxaa la qabtay khalad marka HTML la falanqeynayay. Farriinta khaladku waa "$1".
externaldata-error-converting-css-to-xpa:
Waxaa la qabtay khalad marka CSS selector $1 loo beddelay XPath:
$2
externaldata-missing-library: Maktabadda $1, oo loo baahan yahay si loo isticmaalo parser function '$2' ama $3 Lua function, waa maqan tahay.
externaldata-empty-file: Lama heli karo waxa ku jira faylka $1.
externaldata-not-a-directory: $1 ma aha gal ama waa maqan yahay.
externaldata-exe-shell-disabled: Cilad: Maamulaha PHP ayaa damiyay gelitaanka shell.
externaldata-exe-incomplete-information: Cilad: Macluumaadka amarkan ID $1 ($2) ma dhammaystirna.
externaldata-illegal-parameter: Cilad: Cabbirka $1 wuxuu leeyahay qiime aan la oggolayn $2.
externaldata-exe-exception: Cilad: Khalad ayaa dhacay marka la isku dayayay in la socodsiiyo barnaamijka $1. Farriinta: $2.
externaldata-exe-error: Cilad: Barnaamijka $1 wuxuu soo celiyay exit code $2. Farriinta: $3.
external-data-archive-could-not-extract: Cilad: lama soo saari karo faylka $2 ee kaydka $1 ($3)
externaldata-no-local-variable: Cilad: lama dejin variable maxalli ah "$1".
externaldata-no-loop-body: Cilad: lama dejin jirka wareega sida cabbirka koowaad ama labaad.
